focus.feature: risk-control & trust service production design (text+image, LLM via Spring AI Alibaba; architecture + implementation plan doc)
focus.docSource: 风控与信任服务-实现方案.md

observations: RiskController/RiskService currently act as placeholders: textScan always returns PASS, imageScan only returns taskId, userStatus always NORMAL; docs need a real decision/action/audit feedback loop design.

社交接口.md risk section uses /v1 paths and includes user_id in params, but code routes are under /api/v1/risk and userId is taken from UserContext; documentation should align to code contract to avoid client confusion.
The Maven stack already includes Redis and RabbitMQ (spring-boot-starter-data-redis, spring-boot-starter-amqp), which can be reused for hot counters/blacklists and async scan/review pipelines.
社交领域数据库.md only drafts risk_punishment; there is no repository/DAO implementation yet, so a minimal schema extension plan (decision_log/case/rule_version) should be documented as phased evolution.

User scope is explicitly limited to TEXT + IMAGE for now (video is future); image moderation uses multimodal LLM; LLM must not block online decision path at 50k QPS, only async scan/spot-check/quarantine release.
